author: Hulu YouTube
text:
Million Dollar Nannies | Official Trailer | Hulu
It's not a job, it's a lifestyle. A young group of elite nannies heads to Ibiza to launch a new kind of agency, built by nannies, for nannies. They're promised VIP families, life-changing money, and a shot at something bigger than any of them could build alone. But fierce competition, personal drama, and a scandal from the past threaten to derail the dream before the summer sets. 

Million Dollar Nannies premieres June 17 on Freeform, all episodes June 18 on Hulu.
